ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team playing in the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team playing in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Game attendance */,
  "referee_1" TEXT /* First referee assigned to the game */,
  "referee_2" TEXT /* Second referee assigned to the game */,
  "referee_3" TEXT /* Third referee assigned to the game */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "original_pdf" TEXT /* Path to the original PDF document of the game's report */,
  "box_score_url" TEXT /* URL to the box score of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("abbreviation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Player's years of experience in the league */,
  "draft_info" TEXT /* Information about the player's draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_decisions" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review decision */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being reviewed */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  "review_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the review */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Outcome of the review */,
  "decision_detail" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the review decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_event_types" (
  "game_event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event type */,
  "game_event_type" TEXT /* Category of game events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foul_types" (
  "foul_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foul type */,
  "foul_type" TEXT /* Category of fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foul_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Referee's years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
column_names: Away team playing in the game
